query:
-- Check distinct billingPlatform values and invoice sources
SELECT DISTINCT billingPlatform, invoiceSource, COUNT(*) as cnt
FROM billing_items
GROUP BY billingPlatform, invoiceSource
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 20;
